headline: MRT3 Circle Line Budget Balloons to RM45 Billion
context: MRT3 Circle Line cost increased from RM31 billion to RM45 billion in latest revision presented to Cabinet in February 2026.

cards.big: MRT3 Circle Line cost jumps 45% from RM31 billion to RM45 billion
cards.sub: Latest revision makes it Malaysia most expensive single infrastructure project

cards.big: Original 2017 estimate was RM22 billion before cancellation and revival in 2023
cards.sub: Project underwent 4 major cost revisions in under a decade

cards.big: 40km elevated circle connecting 26 stations now projected for 2033 completion
cards.sub: Timeline slipped 3 years from original 2030 target due to land acquisition

cards.big: Cost per km at RM1.1 billion exceeds Singapore MRT at RM850 million per km
cards.sub: PAC demanded independent audit of engineering and procurement cost assumptions

cards.big: Cost escalation tests whether mega-project governance can control spending
RM45 billion for MRT3 — cost overruns reward contractors while taxpayers absorb the risk premium.
